{
  DomainService:
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Loans\Services;

/** A stateless domain service. */
final class FinePolicy
{
    public function fineFor(int $daysOverdue, int $dailyRate): int
    {
        return (($daysOverdue > 0) ? ($daysOverdue * $dailyRate) : 0);
    }
}
,
  ApplicationService:
<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Loans\Services;

use Koine\Loans\ValueObjects\LoanId;
use Koine\Loans\ValueObjects\Money;

/** Application-service boundary for the LoanService use cases. */
interface LoanService
{
    public function borrowItem(Money $amount): LoanId;

    public function returnItem(LoanId $id): void;
}

}
